title: pelargonium × dianthiflorum
intro: Pelargonium × dianthiflorum, also known as Cape Geranium or Sweet Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach upsets, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × dianthiflorum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and even exhibiting antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other infections.
